item.action: Keep identifier-profile eligibility and confusable uniqueness as independent mandatory admission gates.

progress.finding: UTS #39 specifies identifier profiles and confusable detection separately; neither result can substitute for the other.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using an exact functional copy of the committed artifacts.
progress.limits: This is a composition policy, not a General Security Profile evaluator, skeleton implementation, script resolver, or UTS #39 conformance claim.

item.handoff: Evidence-ingestion and identity-registry consumers should require versioned, complete outputs from both upstream mechanisms and reject on any incomplete, negative, or conflicting result.

coordination_note: Additive projection used to avoid overwriting canonical queue state or concurrent team updates.
